title: Tender Romantic Indian Chicken Curry
description: A fragrant, tender chicken curry with hazelnuts and a smoky tadka, perfect for a romantic dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp oil in a heavy‑bottom pan over medium heat and add cumin seeds, letting them sizzle for 10‑15 seconds.
Add sliced onions and sauté until golden brown, about 8 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and grated ginger, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Pour in tomato puree and cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and oil begins to separate, about 5 minutes.
Add the chicken pieces, salt, turmeric, coriander powder, and garam masala; cook, stirring, until the chicken is sealed on all sides, about 7 minutes.
Reduce heat to low, pour in whisked yogurt, and simmer gently, covering, for 15 minutes, until the chicken is tender and fully cooked.
Meanwhile, toast hazelnuts in a dry skillet until golden and fragrant; chop roughly and set aside.
Prepare a tadka: Heat remaining oil in a small pan, add a pinch of salt, then pour the hot oil over the cooked curry to release the spices. Stir in toasted hazelnuts and chopped cilantro.
Garnish the curry with extra cilantro leaves and serve immediately with steamed basmati rice or naan.
Optionally, garnish with a drizzle of cream or a dash of chili flakes for an extra romantic touch.
